nasb.text: So there were furnished from the thousands of Israel, a thousand from each tribe, twelve thousand armed for war.

esv.text: So there were provided, out of the thousands of Israel, a thousand from each tribe, twelve thousand armed for war.

cnv.text: 於是從以色列千萬人中，每支派選出一千人，共有一萬二千人，都武裝起來去打仗。

ccb.text: 于是，他们从以色列每个支派选出一千人，武装了一万二千军兵。
